summary: Iteration 2: Validated new /api/share-card endpoint (EN+FR PNG @ 1080x1350, strict ISO validator), confirmed /api/reading ISO validator, added frontend testIDs (cta-explore, daily-card, hemisphere-N/S, deep-reading-text, open-share-card, share-card-modal, share-card-image, download-share-card, close-share-card). All 14 new backend tests pass + previously-passing health/daily still pass. Full frontend share-card modal flow verified in mobile viewport (390x844) + EN/FR language toggle still working.
critical_code_review_comments: Language toggle uses a single parent testID 'language-toggle' wrapping plain EN/FR text divs (no individual data-testid='lang-toggle-en'/'lang-toggle-fr'). Functionally correct but less test-friendly.
server.py:322 uses random.Random seeded by birth_date+sign_name inside endpoint handler — ok for deterministic cards but consider a top-level import.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 green. Pillow font load working; /app/backend/fonts/*.ttf all valid. Share card ~100-300KB per PNG. EN/FR cards byte-differ. Strict ISO regex ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$ plus strptime double-check properly rejects malformed dates on BOTH /api/share-card and /api/reading with 422. Frontend /result page: open-share-card sits below the deep-reading CTA; modal uses testIDs share-card-modal / share-card-image / download-share-card / close-share-card (all verified). Lang toggle testID is 'language-toggle' (container) — click the inner EN / FR text nodes to switch.
